metadata.description: Complete e-commerce product dataset - cleaned, standardized, and enriched for production use

products.name: Nike Classic Green & Black Athletic Running Shoes for Men

description.short: Professional-grade running shoes designed with breathable mesh and responsive cushioning for everyday performance.
description.detailed: Experience premium comfort with Nike's engineered green and black athletic running shoes, built for men who demand performance. Features include multi-directional traction pattern for superior grip, breathable mesh upper for optimal ventilation, responsive cushioning in the midsole for impact protection, and a durable rubber outsole. Perfect for running, gym workouts, or casual daily wear.
highlights: Breathable mesh upper for superior ventilation
Responsive cushioning technology for impact protection

products.name: Denim Classic Green Jacket for Men

description.short: Timeless denim jacket in vibrant green, perfect for layering and creating versatile looks for any season.
description.detailed: A wardrobe staple, this classic denim jacket in eye-catching green offers durability and style. Constructed from high-quality denim fabric, it features a traditional button-front design, multiple functional pockets for storage, and a comfortable fit. Works perfectly as a layering piece over t-shirts, hoodies, or sweaters.

products.name: Caliber Premium Green Leather Dress Shoes for Men

description.short: Premium green leather shoes offering sophistication and comfort for professional and casual occasions.
description.detailed: Elevate your collection with Caliber's premium green leather shoes. Handcrafted from genuine full-grain leather, these shoes deliver both style and durability. Features include a cushioned insole for all-day comfort, genuine leather construction, and a polished finish.

products.name: Fossils Grey Analog Alarm Clock with Loud Dual Bell

description.short: Classic dual-bell alarm clock in grey with loud alarm and easy-to-read face for reliable wake-ups.
description.detailed: Never sleep through an alarm with this traditional Fossils grey alarm clock. Features the iconic dual-bell design with a deafening ring that guarantees wake-ups. Large, easy-to-read analog face provides clear visibility from across the room. Simple lever controls make it easy to use.

products.name: Nike Grey & White Performance Running Shoes for Men

description.short: High-performance running shoes from Nike combining grey and white colorway with advanced cushioning technology.
description.detailed: Made for serious runners and fitness enthusiasts. Engineered with Nike's latest cushioning technology to reduce impact during intense workouts. Breathable mesh upper keeps feet cool, while responsive midsole provides energy return.

products.name: Huba Premium Grey Hoodie for Men

description.short: Comfortable casual grey hoodie perfect for layering and everyday wear with modern urban style.
description.detailed: Stay warm and stylish with Huba's premium grey hoodie designed for modern men. Crafted from soft, breathable cotton-blend fabric that provides exceptional comfort. Features spacious kangaroo pocket, adjustable drawstring hood, and ribbed cuffs.

products.name: Timberland Premium Grey Leather Crossbody Bag

description.short: Sophisticated grey leather crossbody bag from Timberland, perfect for travel, work, or daily adventures.
description.detailed: This stylish grey leather crossbody bag combines functionality with premium aesthetics. Made from genuine, durable leather that improves with age. Multiple interior compartments keep essentials organized. Adjustable crossbody strap allows comfortable carrying.

products.name: Nike Grey Running Shoes - Professional Track Edition

description.short: Professional grey running shoes engineered for serious athletes seeking speed and comfort on the track.
description.detailed: Designed for runners who take their performance seriously. Features state-of-the-art cushioning technology that absorbs impact while providing responsive feedback. Lightweight mesh construction minimizes fatigue during long-distance running.

products.name: Fossils Classic Hand Bracelet - Unisex Design

description.short: Elegant hand bracelet from Fossils, versatile unisex design suitable for both men and women.
description.detailed: Add sophistication to your wrist with this classic hand bracelet from Fossils. The timeless design appeals to both men and women. Crafted with attention to detail featuring quality materials and elegant finishing. Perfect for everyday wear.

products.name: Timberland Premium Handbag for Women

description.short: Sophisticated leather handbag from Timberland, designed with functionality and elegance for modern women.
description.detailed: Elevate your accessory game with Timberland's premium handbag. Crafted from genuine leather, this versatile bag combines style with practicality. Multiple compartments keep belongings organized. Sturdy handles provide comfortable carrying.

products.name: Timberland Leopard Print Umbrella Heels for Women

description.short: Stylish leopard print umbrella heels from Timberland, combining fashion with protective design for women.
description.detailed: Stand out with these trendy leopard print umbrella heels. Designed with both style and practicality in mind. The unique leopard pattern adds personality to any outfit, while the heel provides elegant elevation.

products.name: Logitech Wireless Optical Mouse - Pro Edition

description.short: Professional wireless mouse from Logitech with precision optical tracking and ergonomic design.
description.detailed: Experience smooth, accurate cursor control with Logitech's wireless optical mouse. Features precision tracking for gaming and professional work. Ergonomic design reduces hand and wrist strain. Easy plug-and-play connectivity.

products.name: Apple MacBook Pro - 13-inch Laptop

description.short: Powerful MacBook Pro 13-inch offering premium performance with Apple's latest technology.
description.detailed: The MacBook Pro delivers exceptional performance for professionals and creatives. Features stunning Retina display, lightning-fast processing, and all-day battery life. Built from premium aluminum for durability.

products.name: Meizu Wireless Wired Headphone with Active Noise Cancellation

description.short: Premium wired headphones from Meizu featuring active noise cancellation and superior audio quality.
description.detailed: Enjoy immersive audio with Meizu's professional-grade wired headphones. Active noise cancellation blocks out background distractions. Premium drivers deliver clear, balanced sound across all frequencies.

products.name: Nike Air Force 1 Men's Classic Basketball Shoes

description.short: Iconic Nike Air Force 1 basketball shoes, a timeless classic for style and performance.
description.detailed: The legendary Nike Air Force 1 has been a cultural icon since 1982. These classic basketball shoes combine style with comfortable support. Perfect for both court performance and casual street style.

products.name: Nike High Top Basketball Shoes for Men

description.short: High-top nike basketball shoes designed for ankle support and court performance.
description.detailed: Premium high-top basketball shoes from Nike built for performance on the court. Padded ankle collar provides excellent support. Responsive cushioning absorbs impact during intense games.

products.name: Nikon D3500 DSLR Camera - Beginner Photography Kit

description.short: Professional Nikon DSLR camera perfect for photography enthusiasts and professionals.
description.detailed: The Nikon D3500 is an excellent choice for anyone looking to get into serious photography. Features a 24.2MP sensor, 3-inch tilting touchscreen, and built-in wireless connectivity. Captures stunning images in any lighting condition.

products.name: Nike Off-White Air Force 1 Premium Sneakers

description.short: Exclusive Nike Off-White Air Force 1 collaboration sneakers with premium materials and unique styling.
description.detailed: Limited edition collaboration between Nike and Off-White designer Virgil Abloh. Features premium materials, unique design elements, and collectible appeal. Perfect for sneaker enthusiasts and fashion-forward individuals.

products.name: Nike Air Huarache Orange & White Running Shoes

description.short: Classic Nike Air Huarache with bold orange and white colorway for active men.
description.detailed: The iconic Nike Air Huarache delivers comfort and style. Features responsive Air cushioning technology and a neoprene bootie construction for a sock-like fit.

products.name: Classic Orange Button-Up Jacket for Men

description.short: Stylish orange button-up jacket, perfect for layering and creating eye-catching looks.
description.detailed: A versatile piece in vibrant orange that adds character to any wardrobe. Features classic button-up design, multiple pockets, and comfortable fit.

export_summary.note: This is a sample of the first 20 products. Complete dataset with all 196 products can be generated upon request.
